name: Montenegro
description:
This is my AU

I'm going to leave some facts about him (there's much more on the character description this is just a nity summary)

• Full Name: Montenegro Broz

• Gender: Male

• Occupation: Biology teacher

• Height: ~1.78m

• Build: Strong, muscular, well-defined physique

• Skin: Light/clear complexion

• Hair: Short brown hair

• Eyes: Hazel / light brown

• Personality Traits: Friendly and attentive, protective of loved ones, colder but still polite with strangers, politically explosive and aggressive when discussing politics, non-judgmental and resilient

• Siblings: Krajina & Serpska (death elder siblings), Croatia & Serbia (Older sisters), Bosnia (Older brother), Slovenia & Macedonia (Younger sisters), Yugoslavia (Father, deceased)

• Backstory Summary: Raised in a typical Yugoslav childhood by his father and maternal figure Slovakia; became paranoid and reclusive during the Balkan wars and due to a debt with the Chinese government; resumed life after meeting Nisava online; provided medical assistance during the war without direct involvement in combat

• Likes: Animals, plants, politics (Titoist left-wing), walks, working out, chocolate cake

• Hobbies: Plant care, reading, TV, running, gym training
creator: _Hachi_
